subject: Sociology
title: Theories of Globalization
description: A short lesson to help you apply Theories of Globalization.

hook.text: Is globalization a force for freedom or a tool of domination? Sociologists have sharply different answers.

buildup.text: Hyperglobalists say nation-states are fading as global markets and institutions take over governance.

discovery.text: Skeptics argue globalization is overstated. Nations still control borders, armies, and most economic policy.

twist.text: Transformationalists take the middle ground: globalization is real but uneven, contested, and reversible.

climax.text: How you theorize globalization shapes what solutions you propose for inequality, conflict, and climate change.

quiz.question: What do transformationalists argue about globalization?
options: It's real but uneven, contested, and reversible
